heading: A complete raised flooring service
description: From consultancy and survey through to installation, alteration and strengthening — whatever the project, we can handle it.

services.title: Consultancy & survey
services.description: Expert advice plus full site inspection and survey services to specify the right system for your project.

services.title: CAD setting-out drawings
services.description: Production of detailed CAD setting-out drawings so every panel, cut-out and edge is planned before we start.

services.title: Supply & installation
services.description: Supply and installation of all types of new raised access flooring, to PSA spec and BS EN 12825.

services.title: Removal & replacement
services.description: Removal and/or replacement of existing raised floors, including strengthening works for heavier loads.

services.title: Alterations & floor boxes
services.description: Alterations following wall or partition changes, plus relocation, removal or addition of floor boxes.

services.title: Ramps, steps & handrails
services.description: New ramps, steps and handrails to finish off and provide safe, compliant access to your raised floor.
